General.Name: China Success Finance Grp hldg
General.Description: China Success Finance Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides financial and non-financial guarantee, financial leasing, factoring, and financial consultancy services in the People's Republic of China, South Africa, and Australia. It operates through Financial Services: Market Hog: and Energy Storage segments. The company offers financial guarantees, such as corporate financial, individual credit, financial leasing equipment, trusteeship, joint bond, corporate bond issuance, non-financing, and performance guarantees, as well as letter of guarantee for construction, and financing/financial consultancy and financial technology services. It also provides asset management services, including investment and financing management, asset/debt restructuring, special asset acquisition, corporate financial management, and financial consultancy services; and invests in equity. In addition, the company offers private equity fund management, asset management, and investment advisory services; financial leasing services, such as direct, trusted, and joint leasing, as well as sale-leaseback and bank factoring; and investment and acquisition, overseas capital, supply chain finance, real estate finance, and micro credit services, as well as agricultural development and portfolio management services. Further, the company sells market hogs and energy storage systems; trades in energy storage system; and provides cloud technology development services. China Success Finance Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1996 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: 604, Tesbury Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
